title: Funerary inscription for Kornelios Agathemeros

material._: Coarse-grained, banded, white marble, likely Aphrodisian, Parian-2, Parian-3, Proconnesian, Thasian-1, Thasian-2, Thasian-3. Digital microscopy: heteroblastic fabric (identification based on pXRF, digital microscopy)

date._: 2nd century CE or first half of 3rd century CE

provenanceFound._:
Found in the mid-eighteenth century during foundation works for the
                                Collegio di Maria (founded in 1752), outside the Porta Stesicorea (Porta di Aci), on the
                                eastern side of Piazza Stesicoro. Found with the inscription no.27, set up by the same
                                man.

graphics.desc: Photo by students of Liceo M.M. Lazzaro, Catania

location.address: Castello Ursino, Piazza Federico II di Svevia, 95121 Catania (CT)
